name: up-banking
description: Private Up Banking MCP with 1Password, macOS Keychain, or manual-session authentication; read the README before setup.

interface.shortDescription: Private Up balances, transactions, and cashflow
interface.longDescription: Read the README before setup. Adds a local MCP integration for personal Up accounts, balances, transaction search, category and tag metadata, and privacy-bounded cashflow summaries. A short-lived local broker uses 1Password, macOS Keychain with Touch ID/passcode, or a manual memory-only session, keeping the token outside Codex configuration and model context.
defaultPrompt: Summarise my last 30 days of spending by category.
Find my recent settled Up transactions.
